calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard Richard B Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Apr-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
